title: U.S. GDP REPORT
subtitle:
Special profitability
on USD/JPY
text-1: A GDP report is a heavyweight even among other major economic market movers. That’s why all market participants are now anxiously waiting for the Bureau of Economic Analysis to deliver their findings this Friday.
text-2: Ever since the Global Financial Crisis, US Q1 economic data has been coming in weak. According to expert analysis, the upcoming report is likely to follow that trend as the GDP growth rate is estimated to go from +2.1% to +1.1%. Should the published rate go below the expected level, the value of the US dollar may take a hit.
text-3: Turn this occasion into a trading opportunity with a special 90% profitability on USD/JPY!
note-text: You can find the latest market overviews and forecasts on the IQ Option blog.
asterisk: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid from 11:30 to 13:30 GMT.
